node.statement: SYMMETRIC AMBIENT JORDAN IDENTITY (exact). CLAIM: in B(H)_sa with the ambient Jordan product ‚ąė (def jordan-product), (a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa=a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa) for all a,b, where a^2=a‚ąėa. PROOF: GT-jordan-identity is HOS eq (2.18): a‚ąė(b‚ąėa^2)=(a‚ąėb)‚ąėa^2 (an exact identity valid for the special Jordan product on any associative algebra, in particular B(H)). The product ‚ąė is commutative: a‚ąėb=b‚ąėa (GT-jordan-product, since (1/2)(ab+ba)=(1/2)(ba+ab)). Apply commutativity to BOTH sides of (2.18): LHS a‚ąė(b‚ąėa^2)=(b‚ąėa^2)‚ąėa=(a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa (inner b‚ąėa^2=a^2‚ąėb by commutativity, then outer a‚ąėX=X‚ąėa); RHS (a‚ąėb)‚ąėa^2=a^2‚ąė(a‚ąėb)=a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa) (outer commutativity, then inner a‚ąėb=b‚ąėa). Therefore (a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa=a^2‚ąė(b‚ąėa), an EXACT equality of elements of B(H)_sa. (This is one commutativity-relabeling step from (2.18), no error term.) Uses GT-jordan-identity, GT-jordan-product, def jordan-product.
